json.companySlogan: Mithun is an integrated design firm dedicated to creating positive change in people’s lives.
json.companyDescription:
Mithun is an integrated design firm dedicated to creating positive change in people’s lives. As a national practice with offices in Seattle, San Francisco and Los Angeles, we are a unified design studio with an open and collaborative spirit founded on a process of inquiry and listening.

Our team of Architects, Landscape Architects, Interior Designers, Urban Designers and Planners creates seamless experiences that are unique expressions of each client, community and place. We work in a wide range of typologies and scales – with a focus on urban environments and places where people live, work, and learn.

Mithun is an internationally recognized leader in sustainability, combining exemplary design with a focus on building and site performance, human health and social equity. Since the inception of the practice in 1949, our work has been recognized with hundreds of peer and industry awards including six AIA Committee on the Environment Top Ten project honors as well as ranking among the nation’s top design firms.

json.title: Data Science Intern
json.descriptionHtml:
Meet REVOLVE: 


REVOLVE is the next-generation fashion retailer for Millennial and Generation Z consumers. Asa trusted, premium lifestyle brand, and a go-to online source for discovery and inspiration, we deliver an engaging customer experience from a vast yet curated offering totaling over 45,000 apparel, footwear, accessories and beauty styles. Our dynamic platform connects a deeply engaged community of millions of consumers, thousands of global fashion influencers, and more than 500 emerging, established and owned brands. Through 16 years of continued investment in technology, data analytics, and innovative marketing and merchandising strategies, we have built a powerful platform and brand that we believe is connecting with the next generation of consumers and is redefining fashion retail for the 21st century. For more information please visit www.revolve.com.
 


At REVOLVE the most successful team members have a thirst and the creativity to make this the top e-commerce brand in the world. With a team of 1,000+ based out of Cerritos, California we are a dynamic bunch that are motivated by getting the company to the next level. It’s our goal to hire high-energy, diverse, bright, creative, and flexible individuals who thrive in a fast- paced work environment. 


 


Some of the sweetest perks we offer aren’t in a typical benefit package like hefty discount on items we carry – as in 50% or more off retail prices, free weekly lunches, and pretty rad company parties.
 


To take a behind the scenes look at the REVOLVE “corporate” lifestyle check out our Instagram @REVOLVEcareers or .


Are you ready to set the standard for Premium apparel?


 


Main purpose of the Brand Partnerships Intern role:


This is an internship role for a candidate who will use a diverse skill sets across math and computer science, dedicated to solving complex and analytically challenging problems here at Revolve.




Major Responsibilities:


Essential Duties and Responsibilities include the following.  Other duties may be assigned.



  • Partner closely with business leaders in Marketing, Product, Operations, Buying team to plan out valuable data science projects

  • Conduct complex analysis and build models to uncover key learning form data, leading to appropriate strategy recommendations.

  • Work closely with the DBA to improve BI’s infrastructure, architect the reporting system, and invest in time for technical proof of concept. 

  • Work closely with the business intelligence and tech team to define, automate and validate the extraction of new metrics from various data sources for use in future analysis

  • Work alongside business stakeholders to apply our findings and models in website personalization, product recommendations, marketing optimization, to fraud detection, demand forecast, CLV prediction.


Required Competencies:


To perform the job successfully, an individual should demonstrate the following competencies:



  • Outstanding analytical skills, with strong academic background in statistics, math, science or technology.

  • High comfort level with programming, ability to learn and adopt new technology with short turn-around time.

  • Knowledge of quantitative methods in statistics and machine learning 

  • Intense intellectual curiosity – strong desire to always be learning

  • Proven business acumen and results oriented.

  • Ability to demonstrate logical thinking and problem solving skills

  • Strong attention to detail


Minimum Qualifications:



  • Proficient in Python, Pandas, NumPy and other packages

  • Familiar with statistical and ML methodology: causal inference, logistic regression, tree-based models, clustering, model validation and interpretations. 

  • Experience with AB Testing and pseudo-A/B test setup and evaluations

  • Advanced SQL experience, query optimization, data extract

  • Ability to build, validate, and productionize models


Preferred Qualifications:



  • Strong business acumen

  • Experience in deploying end to end Machine Learning models

  • Advanced SQL and Python, with query and coding optimization experience

  • Experience with E-commerce marketing and product analytics is a plus


A successful candidate works well in a dynamic environment with minimal supervision.  At REVOLVE we all roll up our sleeves to pitch-in and do whatever it takes to get the job done. Each day is a little different, it’s what keeps us on our toes and excited to come to work every day. 


 


For individuals assigned and/or hired to work in California, Revolve includes a reasonable estimate of the salary or hourly rate range for this role. This takes into account the wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions; including but not limited to business or organizational needs, skill sets, experience and training, licensure, and certifications.


 


A reasonable estimate of the current base hourly/salary range is $18.50 to $18.50.


 


ATTENTION:


After submitting your application, please check your spam folder for emails on your application status. Emails are sent from an ADP email address.

json.descriptionHtml:

REVOLVE is the next-generation fashion retailer for Millennial and Generation Z consumers. As a trusted, premium lifestyle brand, and a go-to online source for discovery and inspiration, we deliver an engaging customer experience from a vast yet curated offering totaling over 45,000 apparel, footwear, accessories and beauty styles. With a team of 1,000+ based out of Cerritos, California we are a dynamic bunch that are motivated by getting the company to the next level. Some of the sweetest perks we offer aren’t in a typical benefit package like hefty discount on items we carry – as in 50% or more off retail prices, free weekly lunches, and pretty rad company parties.
 


To take a behind the scenes look at the REVOLVE “corporate” lifestyle check out our Instagram @REVOLVEcareers or .


Are you ready to set the standard for Premium apparel?


 


Main purpose of the Strategy Intern  role:


We’re looking for a strategic, analytical, and curious intern to join our team for the summer of 2026. This internship is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of fashion, business, and innovation. As a Strategy Intern, you’ll work directly with the Chief of Staff as main point of contact, but also with senior leaders across departments, contributing to high-impact projects that influence our long-term roadmap.


 


Major Responsibilities:


Essential Duties and Responsibilities include the following.  Other duties may be assigned.



  • Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and trend forecasting to inform business decision

  • Develop financial models and business cases for new opportunities

  • Support strategic initiatives across product, marketing, digital functions

  • Collaborate on cross-functional projects with BI, Marketing, Merchandising, and Operation

  • Present findings and recommendations to leadership at the end of the internship


Required Competencies:


To perform the job successfully, an individual should demonstrate the following competencies:



  • Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and trend forecasting to inform business decision

  • Develop financial models and business cases for new opportunities

  • Support strategic initiatives across product, marketing, digital functions

  • Collaborate on cross-functional projects with BI, Marketing, Merchandising, and Operation

  • Present findings and recommendations to leadership at the end of the internship


Minimum Qualifications:



  • Pursuing a degree in Business, Economics, Fashion Management, or related field 

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

  • Passion for fashion and understanding of market dynamics

  • Proficient in Excel and PowerPoint

  • Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset


Preferred Qualifications:



  • Experience with Tableau or SQL

  • Financial modeling


 


A successful candidate works well in a dynamic environment with minimal supervision.  At REVOLVE we all roll up our sleeves to pitch-in and do whatever it takes to get the job done. Each day is a little different, it’s what keeps us on our toes and excited to come to work every day. 


 


For individuals assigned and/or hired to work in California, Revolve includes a reasonable estimate of the salary or hourly rate range for this role. This takes into account the wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions; including but not limited to business or organizational needs, skill sets, experience and training, licensure, and certifications.


 


A reasonable estimate of the current base hourly/salary range is $17 to $18.50


 


ATTENTION:


After submitting your application, please check your spam folder for emails on your application status. Emails are sent from an ADP email address.

json.title: Design Intern, SRG/Haelo
json.descriptionHtml:
Meet the Owned Brand division of REVOLVE:


REVOLVE is the next-generation fashion retailer for Millennial and Generation Z consumers. As a trusted, premium lifestyle brand and a go-to source for discovery and inspiration, REVOLVE delivers an engaging customer experience from a vast yet curated offering of over 45,000 products. Founded in Los Angeles in 2003 by co-CEOs, Michael Mente and Mike Karanikolas, REVOLVE’s family of brands includes their luxury offering, FWRD and a portfolio of 24 owned brands such as Lovers + Friends, Tularosa, NBD and RAYE.


The Owned Brand division within REVOLVE is an industry-leading fashion design and production house based in Los Angeles. Leveraging the power of REVOLVE’s data driven merchandising, combined with raw creative talent, results in an unparalleled ability to identify specific market niches and develop brands that each have their own identity, designed with a distinct consumer interest and personality in mind.


At REVOLVE the most successful team members have the thirst and creativity to redefine fashion retail for the 21st century, making REVOLVE the leading online retail destination targeted towards Millennial and Generation Z consumers seeking premium fashion. With a team of 1,000 strong, we are a dynamic bunch that are motivated by getting the company to the next level. It’s our goal to hire high-energy, diverse, bright, creative, and flexible individuals who thrive in a fast-paced work environment[RVLV1] . 


Some of the sweetest perks we offer aren’t in a typical benefit package like hefty discounts on items we carry – as in 50% or more off retail prices, free weekly lunches, and pretty rad company parties. 


To take a behind the scenes look at the REVOLVE “corporate” lifestyle check out our Instagram @REVOLVEcareers or .


Are you ready to set the standard for Premium apparel?


Main purpose of the Design Intern role:


To partner with an aspiring designer who is eager to learn about the design process and gain industry experience. To assist in the design department for SRG/Haelo.
 


Major Responsibilities:


Essential Duties and Responsibilities include the following. Other duties may be assigned.



  • Assist with market research of competitors for inspiration and product opportunities.

  • ﻿﻿Research fabrics, finishes, and styling details for review by the Designer.

  • ﻿﻿Assist with design updates (sketches, line guides, PLM, buyer note updates)

  • Attend fittings for all categories and take notes. Follow up with cross functional teams where needed

  • Assist with fabric and trim approvals/organization

  • • Conduct market research where applicable for the brand


Required Competencies:


To perform the job successfully, an individual should demonstrate the following competencies:



  • Passion to learn about the design process from conception to production

  • Receptive to feedback and adaptability in a fast-paced environment


·Minimum Qualifications:



  • Knowledge of Adobe Suite (photoshop, illustrator)

  • Knowledge of basic apparel construction


Preferred Qualifications



  • Working towards a Bachelor’s degree as a current Design Student at a fashion design school

  • Sketching proficiency on procreate or Photoshop




A successful candidate works well in a dynamic environment with minimal supervision. At REVOLVE we all roll up our sleeves to pitch-in and do whatever it takes to get the job done. Each day is a little different, it’s what keeps us on our toes and excited to come to work every day. 






For individuals assigned and/or hired to work in California, Revolve includes a reasonable estimate of the salary or hourly rate range for this role. This takes into account the wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions; including but not limited to business or organizational needs, skill sets, experience and training, licensure, and certifications.




A reasonable estimate of the current base hourly/salary range is $18.50/hr to $18.50/hr.






ATTENTION:


After submitting your application, please check your spam folder for emails on your application status. Emails are sent from an ADP email address.

json.title: Data Entry Clerk
json.descriptionHtml:
About The Company

Cedar Point is a renowned amusement park located in Sandusky, Ohio, known for its thrilling rides, live entertainment, and family-friendly attractions. With over 200 acres of fun-filled experiences, Cedar Point has established itself as a premier destination for entertainment and recreation. The company prides itself on delivering memorable experiences to millions of visitors each year, fostering a vibrant and dynamic work environment for its team members. Committed to excellence, safety, and guest satisfaction, Cedar Point continuously strives to innovate and enhance its offerings, making it a leading name in the amusement park industry.

About The Role

We are seeking a dedicated Warehouse Data Clerk to join our vibrant team at Cedar Point. This role plays a crucial part in maintaining the efficiency of our retail warehouse operations. As a Warehouse Data Clerk, you will be responsible for accurately inputting merchandise and game transfer data into our inventory system, generating inventory reports, and printing barcode stickers for merchandise. You will also assist in verifying inventory accuracy by checking variances between physical counts and packing slips, ensuring our stock levels are precise and up-to-date. This position offers an excellent opportunity to develop administrative skills while working in a fun, fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate will be proficient in Microsoft Word and Excel, detail-oriented, and eager to contribute to a team that values safety, accuracy, and excellent service.

Qualifications

  • You! We are looking for enthusiastic individuals who enjoy helping others and supporting team efforts.
  • Strong interpersonal skills to interact effectively with guests and team members from diverse backgrounds.
  • Good judgment and a strong commitment to safety protocols.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Word and Excel is required.
  • Availability to work during weekdays, weekends, evenings, and holidays as needed.
  • A passion for Cedar Point and a positive attitude towards creating memorable guest experiences.

Responsibilities

Join our world-class team at Cedar Point and contribute to delivering premier entertainment and unforgettable experiences. Your responsibilities will include:

  • Accurately input merchandise and game transfer data into the inventory management system to ensure stock levels are maintained correctly.
  • Run inventory reports, suggest transfers based on stock needs, and print barcode stickers for merchandise and games.
  • Assist in checking variances between physical counts and packing slips to identify and resolve discrepancies.
  • Support the overall organization and cleanliness of the warehouse to facilitate efficient operations.
  • Collaborate with team members to ensure inventory accuracy and support other administrative tasks as needed.
  • Maintain a safe working environment by adhering to safety guidelines and protocols.

Benefits

At Cedar Point, we value our team members and offer a range of perks and benefits to enhance your employment experience, including:

  • Paid training to help you succeed in your role.
  • FREE uniforms to ensure you look and feel your best while working.
  • Complimentary admission to Cedar Point and other company properties for you and your family.
  • Discounts and free tickets to local attractions, providing opportunities for leisure and exploration.
  • Exclusive employee-only ride nights, game nights, and free food events to foster team spirit and fun.
  • 20% discounts on food and merchandise throughout the park.

Equal Opportunity

Cedar Point is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, or any other protected status. We believe in providing equal employment opportunities and fostering a workplace where everyone feels valued and respected.

json.title: Supply Chain Analyst
json.descriptionHtml:
Overview


We are seeking a proactive Supply Chain Analyst to monitor, analyze, and optimize supply chain operations for efficiency and cost savings. This role involves data-driven insights to support inventory, logistics, and procurement decisions across the organization.


Key Responsibilities


  • Collect and analyze supply chain data from procurement, inventory, production, and delivery processes to identify inefficiencies.
  • Develop and implement optimization strategies, such as inventory planning, demand forecasting, and route scheduling.
  • Monitor KPIs, track supplier performance, and generate reports on costs, delivery times, and overall performance.
  • Collaborate with vendors, logistics providers, and internal teams to negotiate contracts and ensure compliance.
  • Conduct risk assessments and recommend improvements to streamline operations and reduce costs.
  • Maintain inventory systems, oversee procedures, and support ERP tools for accurate data management.


Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business, or a related field.
  • 1-3 years of experience in supply chain, logistics, or analytics; proficiency in Excel, SQL, and ERP systems (e.g., SAP).
  • Strong analytical skills with experience in data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau).
  • Excellent problem-solving, communication, and organizational abilities.


Preferred Attributes

  • Certifications like APICS CSCP or knowledge of advanced tools (e.g., Python for analysis).
  • Familiarity with sustainable supply chain practices and global logistics.


What You’ll Gain

  • Exposure to end-to-end supply chain strategies and cross-functional projects.
  • Opportunities for growth in operations and analytics leadership roles.

json.title: Architectural Designer
json.descriptionHtml:
Full-time Description

We are seeking a well-rounded, concept-driven emerging professional with 2-5 years of post-graduate experience to join our interdisciplinary practice. You’ll be exposed to various project typologies spanning housing, mixed-use, creative workplaces, K-12, higher education, cultural & civic, sustainable districts, neighborhoods and campuses. Our teams are structured to welcome new ideas, foster collaboration, and support continuous professional growth.

We currently collaborate in the office Monday through Thursday. Fridays can be in-office or WFH for most roles.

About Mithun

At Mithun, our design has purpose—to create positive change in people’s lives. We are an internationally recognized leader in sustainability, combining exemplary design with a focus on building and site performance, human health and social equity. Since the inception of the practice in 1949, our work has been recognized with hundreds of peer and industry awards including the 2023 AIA Architecture Firm Award, ULI Global Awards for Excellence and eight AIA Committee on the Environment Top Ten Awards, and numerous ASLA and CSLA awards.

We embrace justice, equity, diversity and inclusion (JEDI) as key expressions of our mission of Design for Positive Change. We are committed to promoting JEDI both internally and externally in our firm culture, project work and partnerships. A JUST organization since 2017, Mithun’s goal is not just good intentions but real impact for the people, communities and clients we serve.

Role & Responsibilities

  • Generate high-quality design drawings, graphic design work, renderings and visualizations to support design projects and marketing pursuits.
  • Assist in producing detailed architectural documentation, including plans, sections, elevations, and details, ensuring compliance with building codes and regulations.
  • Participate in team meetings, both internal and external, providing insights and ideas to contribute to project development.
  • Work collaboratively with designers, architects, interior designers, landscape architects, and urban designers to support multiple projects in a variety of design phases.

Requirements

  • A bachelor’s or master’s degree in architecture.
  • 2-5 years of post-graduate professional experience.
  • Demonstrated strong concept-based approach to design.
  • Excellent graphic communication abilities (hand and digital).
  • Enthusiasm for sustainable and innovative design solutions.
  • Familiarity with building codes, regulations, and construction methods.
  • Experience in Revit, and the Adobe Creative Suite.
  • Experience with tools and applications such as Lumion, Enscape, Unreal/Twinmotion, Grasshopper, Rhino, SketchUp, and GIS is not required but considered a plus.

Please include your resume and relevant work samples.

Mithun benefits include medical, dental, vision, life and disability insurance, parental leave, transit benefits, a 401(k) retirement plan and an annual discretionary bonus opportunity. We offer eight paid holidays, vacation accrual of twelve days per year, sick time accrual, and paid volunteer time. Flexible Spending Accounts or Health Savings Accounts are available based on eligibility requirements. The expected range of compensation for this role is $74,000 – 86,000 per year. Actual salaries are based on experience, qualifications, internal equity and location.

Mithun is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

This position is based in our San Francisco, CA location.

json.companySlogan: Mithun is an integrated design firm dedicated to creating positive change in people’s lives.
json.companyDescription:
Mithun is an integrated design firm dedicated to creating positive change in people’s lives. As a national practice with offices in Seattle, San Francisco and Los Angeles, we are a unified design studio with an open and collaborative spirit founded on a process of inquiry and listening.

Our team of Architects, Landscape Architects, Interior Designers, Urban Designers and Planners creates seamless experiences that are unique expressions of each client, community and place. We work in a wide range of typologies and scales – with a focus on urban environments and places where people live, work, and learn.

Mithun is an internationally recognized leader in sustainability, combining exemplary design with a focus on building and site performance, human health and social equity. Since the inception of the practice in 1949, our work has been recognized with hundreds of peer and industry awards including six AIA Committee on the Environment Top Ten project honors as well as ranking among the nation’s top design firms.

json.title: Data Science Intern
json.descriptionHtml:
Meet REVOLVE: 


REVOLVE is the next-generation fashion retailer for Millennial and Generation Z consumers. Asa trusted, premium lifestyle brand, and a go-to online source for discovery and inspiration, we deliver an engaging customer experience from a vast yet curated offering totaling over 45,000 apparel, footwear, accessories and beauty styles. Our dynamic platform connects a deeply engaged community of millions of consumers, thousands of global fashion influencers, and more than 500 emerging, established and owned brands. Through 16 years of continued investment in technology, data analytics, and innovative marketing and merchandising strategies, we have built a powerful platform and brand that we believe is connecting with the next generation of consumers and is redefining fashion retail for the 21st century. For more information please visit www.revolve.com.
 


At REVOLVE the most successful team members have a thirst and the creativity to make this the top e-commerce brand in the world. With a team of 1,000+ based out of Cerritos, California we are a dynamic bunch that are motivated by getting the company to the next level. It’s our goal to hire high-energy, diverse, bright, creative, and flexible individuals who thrive in a fast- paced work environment. 


 


Some of the sweetest perks we offer aren’t in a typical benefit package like hefty discount on items we carry – as in 50% or more off retail prices, free weekly lunches, and pretty rad company parties.
 


To take a behind the scenes look at the REVOLVE “corporate” lifestyle check out our Instagram @REVOLVEcareers or .


Are you ready to set the standard for Premium apparel?


 


Main purpose of the Brand Partnerships Intern role:


This is an internship role for a candidate who will use a diverse skill sets across math and computer science, dedicated to solving complex and analytically challenging problems here at Revolve.




Major Responsibilities:


Essential Duties and Responsibilities include the following.  Other duties may be assigned.



  • Partner closely with business leaders in Marketing, Product, Operations, Buying team to plan out valuable data science projects

  • Conduct complex analysis and build models to uncover key learning form data, leading to appropriate strategy recommendations.

  • Work closely with the DBA to improve BI’s infrastructure, architect the reporting system, and invest in time for technical proof of concept. 

  • Work closely with the business intelligence and tech team to define, automate and validate the extraction of new metrics from various data sources for use in future analysis

  • Work alongside business stakeholders to apply our findings and models in website personalization, product recommendations, marketing optimization, to fraud detection, demand forecast, CLV prediction.


Required Competencies:


To perform the job successfully, an individual should demonstrate the following competencies:



  • Outstanding analytical skills, with strong academic background in statistics, math, science or technology.

  • High comfort level with programming, ability to learn and adopt new technology with short turn-around time.

  • Knowledge of quantitative methods in statistics and machine learning 

  • Intense intellectual curiosity – strong desire to always be learning

  • Proven business acumen and results oriented.

  • Ability to demonstrate logical thinking and problem solving skills

  • Strong attention to detail


Minimum Qualifications:



  • Proficient in Python, Pandas, NumPy and other packages

  • Familiar with statistical and ML methodology: causal inference, logistic regression, tree-based models, clustering, model validation and interpretations. 

  • Experience with AB Testing and pseudo-A/B test setup and evaluations

  • Advanced SQL experience, query optimization, data extract

  • Ability to build, validate, and productionize models


Preferred Qualifications:



  • Strong business acumen

  • Experience in deploying end to end Machine Learning models

  • Advanced SQL and Python, with query and coding optimization experience

  • Experience with E-commerce marketing and product analytics is a plus


A successful candidate works well in a dynamic environment with minimal supervision.  At REVOLVE we all roll up our sleeves to pitch-in and do whatever it takes to get the job done. Each day is a little different, it’s what keeps us on our toes and excited to come to work every day. 


 


For individuals assigned and/or hired to work in California, Revolve includes a reasonable estimate of the salary or hourly rate range for this role. This takes into account the wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions; including but not limited to business or organizational needs, skill sets, experience and training, licensure, and certifications.


 


A reasonable estimate of the current base hourly/salary range is $18.50 to $18.50.


 


ATTENTION:


After submitting your application, please check your spam folder for emails on your application status. Emails are sent from an ADP email address.

Are you ready to set the standard for Premium apparel?


 


Main purpose of the Strategy Intern  role:


We’re looking for a strategic, analytical, and curious intern to join our team for the summer of 2026. This internship is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of fashion, business, and innovation. As a Strategy Intern, you’ll work directly with the Chief of Staff as main point of contact, but also with senior leaders across departments, contributing to high-impact projects that influence our long-term roadmap.


 


Major Responsibilities:


Essential Duties and Responsibilities include the following.  Other duties may be assigned.



  • Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and trend forecasting to inform business decision

  • Develop financial models and business cases for new opportunities

  • Support strategic initiatives across product, marketing, digital functions

  • Collaborate on cross-functional projects with BI, Marketing, Merchandising, and Operation

  • Present findings and recommendations to leadership at the end of the internship


Required Competencies:


To perform the job successfully, an individual should demonstrate the following competencies:



  • Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and trend forecasting to inform business decision

  • Develop financial models and business cases for new opportunities

  • Support strategic initiatives across product, marketing, digital functions

  • Collaborate on cross-functional projects with BI, Marketing, Merchandising, and Operation

  • Present findings and recommendations to leadership at the end of the internship


Minimum Qualifications:



  • Pursuing a degree in Business, Economics, Fashion Management, or related field 

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

  • Passion for fashion and understanding of market dynamics

  • Proficient in Excel and PowerPoint

  • Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset


Preferred Qualifications:



  • Experience with Tableau or SQL

  • Financial modeling


 


A successful candidate works well in a dynamic environment with minimal supervision.  At REVOLVE we all roll up our sleeves to pitch-in and do whatever it takes to get the job done. Each day is a little different, it’s what keeps us on our toes and excited to come to work every day. 


 


For individuals assigned and/or hired to work in California, Revolve includes a reasonable estimate of the salary or hourly rate range for this role. This takes into account the wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions; including but not limited to business or organizational needs, skill sets, experience and training, licensure, and certifications.


 


A reasonable estimate of the current base hourly/salary range is $17 to $18.50


 


ATTENTION:


After submitting your application, please check your spam folder for emails on your application status. Emails are sent from an ADP email address.
json.descriptionText: Meet REVOLVE:  REVOLVE is the next-generation fashion retailer for Millennial and Generation Z consumers. As a trusted, premium lifestyle brand, and a go-to online source for discovery and inspiration, we deliver an engaging customer experience from a vast yet curated offering totaling over 45,000 apparel, footwear, accessories and beauty styles. Our dynamic platform connects a deeply engaged community of millions of consumers, thousands of global fashion influencers, and more than 500 emerging, established and owned brands. Through 16 years of continued investment in technology, data analytics, and innovative marketing and merchandising strategies, we have built a powerful platform and brand that we believe is connecting with the next generation of consumers and is redefining fashion retail for the 21st century. For more information please visit www.revolve.com.  At REVOLVE the most successful team members have a thirst and the creativity to make this the top e-commerce brand in the world. With a team of 1,000+ based out of Cerritos, California we are a dynamic bunch that are motivated by getting the company to the next level. It’s our goal to hire high-energy, diverse, bright, creative, and flexible individuals who thrive in a fast-paced work environment.    Some of the sweetest perks we offer aren’t in a typical benefit package like hefty discount on items we carry – as in 50% or more off retail prices, free weekly lunches, and pretty rad company parties.  To take a behind the scenes look at the REVOLVE “corporate” lifestyle check out our Instagram @REVOLVEcareers or . Are you ready to set the standard for Premium apparel?   Main purpose of the Strategy Intern  role: We’re looking for a strategic, analytical, and curious intern to join our team for the summer of 2026. This internship is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of fashion, business, and innovation. As a Strategy Intern, you’ll work directly with the Chief of Staff as main point of contact, but also with senior leaders across departments, contributing to high-impact projects that influence our long-term roadmap.   Major Responsibilities: Essential Duties and Responsibilities include the following.  Other duties may be assigned.   Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and trend forecasting to inform business decision  Develop financial models and business cases for new opportunities  Support strategic initiatives across product, marketing, digital functions  Collaborate on cross-functional projects with BI, Marketing, Merchandising, and Operation  Present findings and recommendations to leadership at the end of the internship  Required Competencies: To perform the job successfully, an individual should demonstrate the following competencies:   Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and trend forecasting to inform business decision  Develop financial models and business cases for new opportunities  Support strategic initiatives across product, marketing, digital functions  Collaborate on cross-functional projects with BI, Marketing, Merchandising, and Operation  Present findings and recommendations to leadership at the end of the internship  Minimum Qualifications:   Pursuing a degree in Business, Economics, Fashion Management, or related field   Strong analytical and problem-solving skills  Passion for fashion and understanding of market dynamics  Proficient in Excel and PowerPoint  Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset  Preferred Qualifications:   Experience with Tableau or SQL  Financial modeling    A successful candidate works well in a dynamic environment with minimal supervision.  At REVOLVE we all roll up our sleeves to pitch-in and do whatever it takes to get the job done. Each day is a little different, it’s what keeps us on our toes and excited to come to work every day.    For individuals assigned and/or hired to work in California, Revolve includes a reasonable estimate of the salary or hourly rate range for this role. This takes into account the wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions; including but not limited to business or organizational needs, skill sets, experience and training, licensure, and certifications.   A reasonable estimate of the current base hourly/salary range is $17 to $18.50   ATTENTION: After submitting your application, please check your spam folder for emails on your application status. Emails are sent from an ADP email address.
